headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving on Thursday?
summary: Wondering what's happening in today's session for the S&P500 index? Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Thursday.

headline: Why Charter (CHTR) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of cable, internet, and telephone services provider Charter (NASDAQ:CHTR) jumped 2.6% in the afternoon session after the company announced the launch of its Spectrum TV App on Google TV and other devices running Android TV's operating system, expanding its streaming service's reach.
